componentSets.name: Button
componentSets.description:
Button triggers user actions — submit, confirm, navigate, or delete. Use Primary for the single most important action on a surface; Secondary or Ghost for supporting actions; Danger / Danger Subtle for destructive or hard-to-reverse actions; Inverted on dark backgrounds.

Rules: never place two Primary buttons side by side. Always pair Danger with an Alert Dialog before executing.

See the 📖 Docs / Button page for the full property + variant + size showcase.
